pages.text:
INSTRUMENT OF ACCESSION

WHEREAS the Convention relating to International Exhibitions was done at Paris on 22 November 1928;

WHEREAS the Convention was amended and supplemented by the

Protocol of 30 November 1972, the Amendments of 24 June 1982 and 31

May 1988;

AND WHEREAS Article 3 of the Protocol provides that the Protocol shall remain open for accession by Governments Parties to the 1928

Convention after 29 November 1973:

NOW THEREFORE, the Government of the Kingdom of Swaziland, hereby accedes to the 1928 Convention and the 1972 Protocol, including the

Amendments of 24 June 1982 and 31 May 1988, and undertakes faithfully to fulfill and carry out all the provisions therein contained.

WITNESS WHEREOF, I, SENATOR DR._ MATHENDELE_MOS

AMINI, Minister of Foreien Affairs and Trade of the Kingdom of Swazila have signed this Instrument of Accession and caused the Seal of the Minister of Foreign Affairs and Trade of the Kingdom of Swaziland to be hereunto affixed.

Done at MBABANE on the fifth day of November in the year of two thousand and seven.

Sister of Foreign Atlair And Trade
